tasks.title: Make wiki-resume honor persisted task focus across sessions
tasks.summary: Fix /wiki-resume without an explicit task so fresh Pi sessions use persisted CodeWiki focus/resume state instead of falling back to the first active roadmap task.

tasks.title: Checkpoint stable refactor baseline before next roadmap
tasks.summary: Verify and close the current refactor stabilization queue only after the hardened verification gateway is in place, then record a stable dogfooding baseline.

tasks.title: Add architecture boundary checks and characterization coverage
tasks.summary: Add guardrails that freeze current behavior and prevent future domain/application/infrastructure/adapters import-boundary regressions during the refactor.

tasks.title: Extract agent-agnostic application use cases behind ports
tasks.summary: Refactor CodeWiki behavior behind application use cases and ports while preserving Pi behavior through compatibility shims.

tasks.title: Move Pi surface into adapters and retire legacy core structure
tasks.summary: Complete the folder migration only after guardrails and application seams exist, moving Pi commands/tools/UI into adapters and deleting legacy duplicates/shims.

tasks.title: Prove the adapter seam with a minimal CLI surface
tasks.summary: After Pi migration is stable, add a minimal CLI adapter that calls the same application use cases to prove the agent-agnostic seam before larger MCP/Codex/Claude integrations.

tasks.title: Design CodeWiki skill package and workflow assets
tasks.summary: Define a CodeWiki skill package with router instructions, deterministic scripts, and grill/plan/build/verify workflow assets adapted from Matt Pocock's skills only where they fit CodeWiki semantics.

tasks.title: Enforce structured knowledge-roadmap-code mapping
tasks.summary: Strengthen CodeWiki schemas, lint, and docs so knowledge docs, sprints, tasks, evidence, and code paths form a navigable vertical mapping for agents.

tasks.title: Introduce sprint planning model
tasks.summary: Add a roadmap sprint layer so the roadmap holds broad intent, future sprints stay outcome-level, and only the next sprint is decomposed into executable tasks.

tasks.title: Automate post-task handoff and context compaction
tasks.summary: Design and implement a safe post-task handoff flow that persists next focus, writes compact resume context, and integrates Pi/VCC/native compaction hooks after commit or push without unsafe automatic pushes by default.

tasks.title: Generate graph-first CodeWiki index
tasks.summary: Replace the legacy generated view zoo with `.codewiki/index_graph.json` as the primary generated read model and derive small status/queue lenses from it when still needed.

tasks.title: Add compiler build and validation report schemas
tasks.summary: Add first-class schemas and writer paths for feedback_build, documentation_build, implementation_build, and validation reports under `.codewiki/builds/**` and `.codewiki/validation/**`.

tasks.title: Build standalone read-only CodeWiki UI
tasks.summary: Detach the human status interface from Pi by creating an agent-agnostic read-only UI that consumes generated `.codewiki/**` and renders Mermaid outside the Pi TUI constraints.

tasks.title: Implement trigger-based heartbeat agency loop
tasks.summary: Replace the current heartbeat planning stub with a bounded trigger-based loop whose names match user-facing moments such as task end, sprint end, roadmap end, and budget end.

tasks.title: Provide optional ThinkCode runtime adapter
tasks.summary: Make ThinkCode a first-class optional runtime for bounded CodeWiki context work while preserving native fallback paths for Pi, Codex, Claude Code, and other agent harnesses.

tasks.title: Introduce tester and builder implementation roles
tasks.summary: Add optional tester/builder workflow support so agent-created tests can be designed from task packs before code implementation.
